title: dombeya sely
intro: Dombeya sely, also known as the Pink Cotton Tree, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, where its roots and leaves are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dombeya sely include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
